Class Lobby

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Network.Server.Lobby
public class Lobby extends Object
A thread-safe registry that manages game rooms and active client connections.

The Lobby acts as the grand central station for the multi-match architecture. Its primary responsibilities include:

  • Managing multiple concurrent GameRoom instances.
  • Handling player room creation, joining, and secure reconnections via PIN.
  • Maintaining active ClientConnection references.
  • Monitoring connection health via a background task that disconnects timed-out clients.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Lobby()
    Constructs a new Lobby and starts the background connection monitoring task.
    Lobby(boolean startMonitor)
    Constructs a new Lobby with optional timeout monitor startup.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    broadcast(String type, String message)
    Broadcasts a targeted message to all active clients (Global).
    void
    broadcastToRoom(int roomId, String type, String message)
    Broadcasts a targeted message to all clients in a specific room.
    boolean

    Creates a new game room.
    boolean

    Creates a new game room.
    void
    disconnectPlayer(String nickname)
    Unregisters a player's connection (they go offline).
    GameRoom

    Retrieves a GameRoom by its ID.
    GameRoom

    Retrieves the GameRoom a specific player is currently in.

    boolean

    void
    shutdown()

  • Constructor Details

    • Lobby

      public Lobby()
      Constructs a new Lobby and starts the background connection monitoring task.

    • Lobby

      public Lobby(boolean startMonitor)
      Constructs a new Lobby with optional timeout monitor startup.
      Parameters:
      startMonitor - true to start background timeout checks, false otherwise.

  • Method Details

    • shutdown

      public void shutdown()
      Stops the background monitor thread.

    • createRoom

      public boolean createRoom(int roomId, String password, int requiredPlayers)
      Creates a new game room.
      Parameters:
      roomId - The requested room ID.
      password - An optional password for the room.
      requiredPlayers - The number of players requested for this match.
      Returns:
      true if created successfully, false if the room ID already exists.

    • createRoom

      public boolean createRoom(int roomId, String password, String creatorNickname, int requiredPlayers)
      Creates a new game room.
      Parameters:
      roomId - The requested room ID.
      password - An optional password for the room.
      creatorNickname - The nickname of the room creator.
      requiredPlayers - The number of players requested for this match.
      Returns:
      true if created successfully, false if the room ID already exists.

    • joinRoom

      public boolean joinRoom(int roomId, String nickname, String pin, ClientConnection handler)
      Attempts to join an existing game room.
      Parameters:
      roomId - The target room ID.
      nickname - The player's nickname.
      pin - The player's secret PIN.
      handler - The active client connection.
      Returns:
      true if successfully joined, false otherwise.

    • reconnectRoom

      public boolean reconnectRoom(int roomId, String nickname, String pin, ClientConnection handler)
      Attempts to reconnect a previously disconnected player.
      Parameters:
      roomId - The target room ID.
      nickname - The player's nickname.
      pin - The secret PIN for validation.
      handler - The new client connection.
      Returns:
      true if successfully reconnected, false otherwise (e.g. wrong PIN or wrong room).

    • getRoom

      public GameRoom getRoom(int roomId)
      Retrieves a GameRoom by its ID.
      Parameters:
      roomId - The target room ID.
      Returns:
      The GameRoom, or null if it doesn't exist.

    • getRoomForPlayer

      public GameRoom getRoomForPlayer(String nickname)
      Retrieves the GameRoom a specific player is currently in.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The player's nickname.
      Returns:
      The GameRoom, or null if the player is not in any room.

    • disconnectPlayer

      public void disconnectPlayer(String nickname)
      Unregisters a player's connection (they go offline). The player remains in the GameRoom for potential reconnection.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The player's nickname.

    • broadcastToRoom

      public void broadcastToRoom(int roomId, String type, String message)
      Broadcasts a targeted message to all clients in a specific room.
      Parameters:
      roomId - The target room ID.
      type - The message type (e.g., "STATUS_UPDATE").
      message - The textual content of the message.

    • broadcast

      public void broadcast(String type, String message)
      Broadcasts a targeted message to all active clients (Global).
      Parameters:
      type - The message type.
      message - The textual content.
